title: Happy Ghast Tiers
description: Are your Happy Ghasts getting you down? Well wipe those tears away with Happy Ghast Tiers! This datapack adds five new tiers of harnesses each providing a small but noticeable speed boost. And as an added bonus we've added Ghast Treats!
body:
TL:DR - [Gallery](./happy-ghast-tiers/gallery)
### Happy Ghast Tiers
Expands Minecraft’s Happy Ghasts with a fully upgradeable harness system, allowing players to give their Happy Ghasts a much-needed speed boost in a way that feels natural to vanilla gameplay.

Harnesses can be upgraded through multiple tiers(~~Vanilla~~Leather, Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite), with each tier providing a small but noticeable increase to flying speed.

Upgrades can be applied sequentially, or players may craft Reinforced Upgrades to skip directly to a desired tier. Players craft the initial harness just like in vanilla. Players can even still dye vanilla harnesses like normal, but once a vanilla harness is upgraded, its color becomes locked to prevent Minecraft from accidentally overriding the custom NBT data of upgraded harnesses. Every future upgrade automatically preserves harness color.

Netherite-tier harnesses & upgrades are fireproof, behaving like vanilla Netherite items when dropped into lava or fire.

-------------------
### **Other features:**
- Happy Ghasts with no rider will be slowed automatically to default speeds
- Happy Ghast Treats can be crafted with snowballs and blaze powder
  - Treats provide a temporary boost just like rockets do for the elytra

-------------------
### **Planned Update:**
- Custom Enchantment granting a 5% flying speed bonus per level (I–III)

_This enchantment is planned for a future release. It has been intentionally delayed while the core Minecraft mechanics remain experimental and subject to refinement. Once added to the base game, I'll be adding a custom enchantment for the harnesses_

-------------------
### **Stretch Goals:**
- Add the ability to dye upgraded tiers from one color to another
- Add an in-game Admin config to toggle if Harnesses are chest loot instead of craftable
- Add an in-game Admin config that allows for custom tier speeds
- Add more variants and 3D model harnesses (a texture pack rework. I'm not an artist)
